description: String concatenation of NOT NULL columns produces a non-nullable String

columns.name: display
columns.note: all operands (name, email, literals) are non-nullable

name: string_concat
query_sql:
-- @name GetUserDisplay
-- @returns :many
SELECT name || ' <' || email || '>' AS display FROM users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
